description: Celebrate leveling up with the Emuworks Gamer Level 18 Unlocked Pin Badge. This stylish 50mm button badge is perfect for the gamer boy or girl turning 18. Featuring a front metal plate etched with "Level 18 Unlocked", it will add fun flair to any birthday outfit or party decor. At just 2 inches wide, the badge is sizable enough to proudly display their gaming achievements without overpowering an outfit. With its trendy design and pin back closure, it's easy to wear all night and show off passion for gaming to fellow player friends. Elevate any 18th birthday celebration in style with this on-trend accessory that's sure to spark joy and nostalgia for leveling up in both real life and favorite games.
